Q1.sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-06-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-07-01'

Q2.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND status <> 'cancelled' AND ordered_at >= '2026-07-01' AND ordered_at < '2026-08-01'

Q3.sql: SELECT s.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS sales FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN stores s ON s.store_id = o.store_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND s.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-01-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY s.store_id, s.name ORDER BY sales DESC

Q4.sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS sales FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND p.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-04-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 3

Q5.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.confirmed_at) AS month, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS sales FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2025-01-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

Q6.sql: SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-06-17' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-07-17'

Q7.sql: SELECT ROUND((may.s - apr.s) * 100.0 / apr.s, 1) FROM (SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS s FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-05-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-06-01') may, (SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS s FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-04-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-05-01') apr

Q8.question: どの期間の売上をご覧になりますか？(例: 今月、直近30日、2026年上半期) また、全社合計か店舗別かもご指定ください。

Q9.question: 「最近の調子」として何をご覧になりたいですか？(例: 直近30日の売上合計、今月の注文件数、前月比)

Q10.reason: 他テナントを含む全テナントのデータは参照できません。現在のテナント(t_alpha)のデータのみ照会可能です。

Q11.reason: tenant_id 't_bravo' は現在のテナントではないため参照できません。

Q12.sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS qty FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND p.tenant_id = 't_alpha' AND o.status = 'confirmed' AND o.confirmed_at >= '2026-06-01' AND o.confirmed_at < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 3
